entry.title: BIP 118 and SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
entry.summary: Since the provided text does not contain substantive content or context to summarize but rather a simple sign-off from an email, there is no relevant information to extract and formulate into a detailed summary. The content mainly consists of a casual farewell remark that does not contribute any factual or thematic substance necessary for a meaningful blog post as per the given instructions.
